cards.duringText:
You may spend (X) CLUES for the following effect: 
1 CLUE - BLIND BOOST this card.
3 CLUES - BOOST this card.
5 CLUES - BOOST this card. Then, double the BOOST value.
cards.title: Crack The Case!

cards.afterText: Remove all of Nancy's CLUES from her EVIDENCE BOARD. Then, if you lost the combat, deal 3 damage to any opposing fighter in your zone.
cards.title: Red Herring

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, your opponent must discard 1 card.
cards.duringText:
Add +1 to this card’s value for each CLUE on the EVIDENCE BOARD.
(You do not spend CLUES for this effect)
cards.title: Master Sleuth

cards.duringText: You may spend 4 CLUES to ignore the opposing fighter's value.
cards.title: Connecting the Dots

cards.duringText: If an opposing fighter is in Nancy's zone, you may spend 1 CLUE to change this card’s value to 5.
cards.title: Gumshoe

cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Feint

cards.afterText: Return the top card of your discard pile to your hand. You may spend 3 CLUES to return any card from your discard pile instead.
cards.title: No Stone Unturned

cards.afterText: Discard the top card of the opposing fighter's deck. Then, gain CLUES based on that card's BOOST value.
cards.title: At the Scene of the Crime

cards.afterText: Cancel all of your opponent's AFTER COMBAT effects. Then, you may spend 5 CLUES to end the turn.
cards.title: Deadline!

cards.basicText: Gain 1 CLUE. Then, Nancy may spend up to 3 CLUES to recover an equal amount of health.
cards.title: Breakthrough

cards.basicText: Look at the top 3 cards of an opposing fighter’s deck. Then, you may spend 2 CLUES to discard a revealed card. Return the rest to the top of the deck in any order.
cards.title: Detective’s Hunch

hero.name: Nancy Drew
hero.specialAbility:
At the start of Nancy’s turn, if she has 5 CLUES on her EVIDENCE BOARD, gain 1 action.

When an opposing fighter enters Nancy's zone, gain 1 CLUE.

ruleCards.content:
(Place CLUES on this card) 
(Max. 5 CLUES)
(You do not spend CLUES for Nancy's special ability)
ruleCards.title: Evidence Board

sidekick.name: Sidekick
sidekick.quote: "Do act mysterious. It always keeps them coming back for more." - Nancy Drew

name: Nancy Drew
note: Famous detective Nancy Drew uses her wits and her fists to solve the Case of her Opponent! The first fighter for my MAGIC AND MYSTERY set!
